session.summary: Implemented action.yml and entrypoint.sh to support CHERENKOV GitHub Action, updated Dockerfile to use the entrypoint wrapper script, wrote unit tests test_github_action.py, verified all 324 unit tests pass, and committed changes.

previous_sessions.summary: Wired the three remaining MCP stub tools (run_k6_perf, export_jira_ticket, scan_mena_compliance) to their respective components (OrchestrationEngine, JiraExporter, MENAComplianceScanner) with input validation at trust boundaries, and verified all 417 unit/integration tests pass in WSL.
